div1.entryFree: Maim, subst. a laming and crippling hurt, a deep injury: so deep a m. as to be cast forth in the common air, R2 I, 3, 156. your father's sickness is a m. to us, H4A IV, 1, 42. that bears so shrewd a m. H6B II, 3, 41. stop those --s of shame seen through thy country, Cor. IV, 5, 92 (--s of shame == shameful --s).
